_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: VS-4718 treatment reduced the percentage of Aldefluor+ cells in direct contrast with the standard cytotoxic agents, which enriched the Aldefluor+ cell subpopulation
details: Reduced percentage of Aldefluor+ cells in contrast to standard cytotoxic agents which enriched the Aldefluor+ cell subpopulation
